de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.TermLabelRefactoring

    • Uses of TermLabelRefactoring in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label that return types with arguments of type TermLabelRefactoring 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getAllApplicationChildAndGrandchildRefactorings()
      Returns all TermLabelRefactorings which operate on application child and grand children, which are TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getChildAndGrandchildRefactorings() and TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getChildAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents().
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getBelowUpdatesRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getChildAndGrandchildRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getChildAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE_AND_PARENTS.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getDirectChildRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_DIRECT_CHILDREN.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer.getSequentRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.SEQUENT.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration.getTermLabelRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring instances.
      Method parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label with type arguments of type TermLabelRefactoring 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected ImmutableArray<TermLabel> TermLabelManager.performRefactoring(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, java.lang.Object hint, Term tacletTerm, Term term, ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
      Computes the new labels as part of the refactoring for the given Term.
      protected Term TermLabelManager.refactorLabelsRecursive(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, java.lang.Object hint, Term tacletTerm, Term term, ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
      Performs a TermLabel refactoring recursively on the given Term.
      protected void TermLabelManager.refactorSemisequent(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, java.lang.Object hint, Term tacletTerm, Semisequent semisequent, boolean inAntec, ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
      Performs a TermLabel refactoring on the given Semisequent.
      protected Term TermLabelManager.replaceTerm(TermLabelState state, PosInOccurrence pio, Term newTerm, TermFactory tf, ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> parentRefactorings, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, java.lang.Object hint, Term tacletTerm)
      Replaces the Term at the specified PosInOccurrence.

      Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label that implement TermLabelRefactoring 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  FormulaTermLabelRefactoring
      The TermLabelRefactoring used to label predicates with a FormulaTermLabel on applied loop invariants or operation contracts.
      class  OriginTermLabelRefactoring
      Refactoring for OriginTermLabels.
      class  RemoveInCheckBranchesTermLabelRefactoring
      This TermLabelRefactoring removes the supported TermLabel in check branches.
